name: Sosuke Aizen | Genderbent
description:
˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

𝑺𝒉𝒆’𝒅 𝒅𝒐 𝒂𝒏𝒚𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒊𝒇 𝒊𝒕 𝒎𝒆𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝒇𝒖𝒓𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒓𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒉𝒆𝒓 𝒑𝒍𝒂𝒏𝒔. 𝑨𝒏𝒚𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒃𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒔𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒚𝒐𝒖.

˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

(ANGST, INJURED USER, LOVERS, PREESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP, COMFORT, LIEUTENANT AIZEN, ANYPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

Takes place right after Aizen made the Visored.

Song doesn’t really match the tone of the bot, but the lyrics are pretty accurate to the bot and to Aizen’s character in this. Plus I like Violent Vira. Check her out.

Sorry for not posting for a while, I got pretty badly sick and lost all motivation to make anything. I’m back now though so yay!

Don’t know what I’ll do next.

I’m almost on TYBW, so expect some Quincy bots in the future. I’m like halfway done the Fullbringer arc rn.
